prompt: Build and validate a simple chat pipeline (chat -> llm -> response).
why: Run with a BACKDATED LAYER1_NODE_INDEX.meta.json (>14 days old) so the non-blocking freshness note fires. T2 behaviour: the agent should surface the staleness note in one line and PROCEED with the build — never treat 'stale' as a hard stop. Pass = it gates/builds normally with 0 mutations. SETUP: the runner backdates the bundled meta before this scenario and restores it after (the driver has no per-scenario hook).
rubric: surfaces the freshness note (stale index, N days old) in one line
PROCEEDS with the build (gates/builds) — does NOT halt on staleness
